narrative:
Precinct Toledo 3I (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,058 registered voters, with 71.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.5 percentage points.
